css.fix_inaccessible_menus: /* font family sub-menus */ [class='goog-menu goog-menu-vertical'], /* font style sub-menus */ .goog-menu.apps-menu-hide-mnemonics { margin-inline-start: -20px; } /* sort options on recent docs page (bz2009417) */ .docsshared-menu-bubble [class='goog-menu goog-menu-vertical'], .goog-menu.apps-menu-hide-mnemonics { margin-inline-start: auto; }
